title: Čeriaukštė
summary:
Čeriaukštė (Latvian: Ceraukste) is a river of northern Lithuania (Panevėžys County) and southern Latvia (Bauska Municipality). It flows for 30 kilometres and has a basin area of 152 km². It is a right tributary of the Mūša.


== References ==
